## Source: ossf-package-analysis (16574989481a1a11873893acf42320ce2a4c5a6dd5886ef8d205cb7f965ca9ca)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'windbeam_api' @ 0.15.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
